title: Initiative
description: Strategic intent inside a venture (Opportunity Management v2 discovery spine: Venture -> Initiative -> Idea). An initiative is time-boxed and references the stable ideas it pursues via ideaRefs[] (M:N). Following the linking principle, the volatile initiative points to stable idea assets; ideas never point back.

tenantId.description: Reserved for the future multi-tenant SaaS layer; null in the local file-based store.

workspaceId.description: Reserved workspace scope for the future SaaS layer; null in the local store.

slug.description: Filesystem-friendly slug, also the '<slug>.initiative.json' filename stem.

description.description: Optional description of the strategic intent.

period.description: Optional time box for the initiative.

start.description: Start date (ISO 8601, YYYY-MM-DD) or null if open.

end.description: End date (ISO 8601, YYYY-MM-DD) or null if open.

ideaRefs.description: Ids of the ideas (opportunity.schema.json) this initiative pursues (M:N). Points volatile -> stable.
